hero.title: Customer Grievance Redressal
hero.subtitle: As per RBI Master Direction – NBFC Customer Protection Directions. All complaints are addressed through a structured four-level escalation process.

levels.label: Customer Support
levels.heading: Customer Support
levels.intro: For any query or issue, first reach out to our customer care team. We are committed to resolving your queries within 7 working days. If your query remains unaddressed, please escalate to the Grievance Redressal Officer.
levels.hours: Monday – Friday, 9:30 AM – 6:30 PM (except on holidays)

levels.label: Grievance Redressal Officer
levels.heading: Grievance Redressal Officer
levels.intro: If you are not satisfied with the resolution provided at Level 1, or if your query remains unaddressed for over 7 days, you can write to our Grievance Redressal Officer.
levels.hours: Monday – Friday, 9:30 AM – 6:30 PM (except on holidays)

levels.label: Principal Nodal Officer
levels.heading: Principal Nodal Officer
levels.intro: If you are not satisfied with the resolution provided by the Grievance Redressal Officer, or if your query remains unaddressed for over 15 days, you can contact the Principal Nodal Officer.

levels.label: RBI Officer-In-Charge
levels.heading: RBI Officer-In-Charge
levels.intro: If the issue is not resolved within 30 days or you are dissatisfied with the resolution, you may appeal to the Regional Office of the Reserve Bank of India under whose jurisdiction the registered office of the Company falls.

address: Regional Office of Department of Supervision
Reserve Bank of India, Fort Glacis, Rajaji Salai

channels.label: (iii) Physical
channels.detail: Centralised Receipt and Processing Centre (CRPC), 4th Floor, Reserve Bank of India, Sector 17, Central Vista, Chandigarh – 160017
